title: samolus cinerascens
intro: Samolus cinerascens, also known as Grey Samolus or Cinerascens, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Primulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Samolus cinerascens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Samolus cinerascens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
